candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Consider the following table of $K_{sp}$ values. The molar solubility of ________ is not affected by the pH of the solution.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
考虑下表 $k_{sp}$ 值。$\ce{NaCl}$、$\ce{KNO3}$和$\ce{NaF}$的摩尔溶解度不受溶液pH的影响。

$\begin{array}{ccc}
\hline
\text{化合物} & k_{sp} & \text{溶解反应} \\
\hline
\ce{AlCl3} & 1.0 \times 10^{-41} & \ce{AlCl3 (s) <=> Al^3+ (aq) + 3Cl^- (aq)} \\
\ce{Na3PO4} & 1.6 \times 10^{-36} & \ce{Na3PO4 (s) <=> 3Na^+ (aq) + PO4^3- (aq)} \\
\ce{NaCl} & 6.0 \times 10^{-9} & \ce{NaCl (s) <=> Na^+ (aq) + Cl^- (aq)} \\
\ce{KNO3} & 3.7 \times 10^{-16} & \ce{KNO3 (s) <=> K^+ (aq) + NO3^- (aq)} \\
\ce{NaF} & 3.2 \times 10^{-19} & \ce{NaF (s) <=> Na^+ (aq) + F^- (aq)} \\
\ce{MnS} & 2.5 \times 10^{-13} & \ce{MnS (s) <=> Mn^2+ (aq) + S^2- (aq)} \\
\hline
\end{array}$
